textByHashes.069d43747fb56132ba9e355e557cb5e7f8f9df0a: Barbarians only. Are you a barbarian? You don't look like one.
textByHashes.725712d317127f1f2fbe472307b0c12104e45ae4: If you're a barbarian you need to be able to drink like one. We barbarians like a good drink.
textByHashes.cb9e8c950389b693075fe3a1de681b732652a687: I have the perfect challenge for you... The Alfred Grimhand Barcrawl! First completed by Alfred Grimhand.
textByHashes.309462f87c802b10e7c0155f7912f1c15e479311: Take that card to each of the bars named on it. The bartenders will know what it means. We're kinda well known.
textByHashes.4028173fb59783b62700541391e8bdca54936905: They'll give you their strongest drink and sign your card. When you've done all that, we'll be happy to let you in.
textByHashes.00d2454a9ed292abc60581a25bb303323ed546a0: Do I look like a bank to you?
textByHashes.f675083abeb41eec6cb05724e4d3cd607521182b: So, how's the Barcrawl coming along?
textByHashes.b696517c6353310ebb040896eca11576d59d5fbb: Well come back when you have, you lightweight.
textByHashes.ace75e8ac78e7db26ae57772381bb3aabf246c3a: What are you like? You're gonna have to start all over now.
textByHashes.9db7432e286bbb10b9ca4fd7825c6daa4296364d: Yep that seems fine, you can come in now. I never learned to read, but you look like you've drunk plenty. Also, one more thing...
textByHashes.7e8c1df1aee113e14b5dc470e2f888d1db344d48: Since you drink like a barbarian, I can show you how to smash your vials when you finish them. Do you want to do that?
textByHashes.8a03a981540eef6386d4b636d95f4394dbc85b72: It's all part of drinking like a barbarian! Okay, you will now smash your vials as you drink your potions.
textByHashes.9a76fb72e4f7230c4067b066ad47ce62704536a7: 'Ello friend. I see you're drinking like a barbarian - do you want to stop smashing your vials when you finish them?
textByHashes.96455a2f3902e289006a118fa5c091458e8c26b6: You're a funny sort of barbarian! But okay, you will no longer smash your vials as you drink your potions.
textByHashes.68d832bde56820069b81df602657e81f9ae905b9: That's a proper barbarian spirit, that is.
textByHashes.accb742f4fe4e4e1a10b8e52c18fa72d2e29b0ab: 'Ello friend. Do you want me to show you how to smash your vials when you finish drinking them?
textByHashes.d77831b8b09ee315193b1378efa1a49176dc7694: Are you, now? Free up some space so you can carry something, and we'll see how barbarian you really are.
textByHashes.b012ead0b4b630187f48f87bb2017415cbc105c9: You need to take it with you when you're going on a barcrawl.
